title: Coating line dryer temperature deviation with web tension oscillation
title_zh: 涂布线干燥二区温控异常与张力波动
station: dryer section and web tension control
operator_note: After a recipe switch, zone 2 temperature became unstable and the web tension alarm appeared intermittently. Thickness inspection showed drift after 10:22.

expected_outputs.primary_root_cause: dryer zone 2 temperature control loop instability
expected_outputs.business_risk: coating thickness drift and potential yield loss
